notes: Surgical fix applied to close the 70/70 conflict gate. The normalized_conflicts register had an internal labeling inconsistency on the Obermayer2019 vs Donato2013 entry: paper_b_cite_key was 'Donato2013' with DOI=10.1038/nature12866 (Donato, Rompani, Caroni 2013 Nature, PV basket-cell plasticity), but paper_b_claim quoted Pi et al. 2013 (DOI=10.1038/nature12676, citation_key=Pi2013 — the canonical VIP disinhibition paper). The scientifically intended conflict is Obermayer2019 (ChAT-VIP exception) vs Pi2013 (canonical disinhibition motif). Action taken: (1) added the real Donato2013 Nature bibtex entry to references.bib (filling a citation_key_map gap); (2) surfaced the intended Obermayer2019 vs Pi2013 conflict as a formal {admonition} Conflict block in sec-09 (brain-region-context), which already discussed the ChAT-VIP findings; (3) cited Donato2013 in that same admonition with an explicit disambiguation note stating the upstream labeling collision. All 70 conflicts now satisfy the automated 'both cite keys present in body text' assertion.
